description: A transaction has closed and funded. The agent must ensure all documents are in the file and archive it for compliance.

nodes.task_description: Identify a transaction that closed more than 7 days ago.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds a recently closed transaction ready for archiving.

nodes.task_description: Run a compliance check on the transaction file to ensure all required documents (e.g., contract, disclosures, closing statement) are present.

expected_outcome.value: Agent uses a checklist to verify the file is complete.

nodes.task_description: Change the status of the transaction file to 'Archived' in the transaction management system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully archives the file, making it read-only.
